title: Paginator
subtitle: Advanced component for data navigation with support for flexible layouts and infinite loading

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.description: Standard configuration with numeric navigation. Supports two-way binding for page and size.

nav-display.title: Navigation display options
nav-display.description: Define how the navigation buttons are displayed: text, icons or both. Customize the appearance of navigation buttons to match your application style.
nav-display.note: Use the navDisplay input with values 'text', 'icon' or 'both' to show only text, only icons or both in the navigation buttons. Icons are based on the Remix Icon library and are automatically assigned depending on the button type (first page, previous page, next page, last page).

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Supports all NUI variants (Solid, Outline, Ghost).
variants.note: Apply the desired variant using the variant input with values 'solid', 'outline' or 'ghost'. The variant mainly affects the style of the active page button, while the navigation buttons maintain a consistent style to ensure clarity and usability.

sizes.title: Page size options
sizes.description: Define a custom set of options for the page size.
sizes.note: Using the size input you can offer users a specific set of page sizes to choose from.

layout.title: Custom layout
layout.description: The most powerful feature. Define exactly where each element goes (top, left, center, right, bottom) using a configuration object.
layout.note:
Important for mobile: Complex layouts designed for desktop may overflow on small screens. Always provide an optimized mobileLayout that rearranges elements vertically and prioritizes essential navigation. This prevents UX issues on mobile devices.

Area system: When a layout is set, attributes like showPageSizeSelector, showFirstLast, showItemRange and showPageJump are ignored because the custom layout has full control over what to show and where.

infinite.title: Infinite loading
infinite.description: Transforms the paginator into a Load more button with integrated loading state. Ideal for mobile lists or feeds.
infinite.note: Enable infinite loading mode with infiniteConfig. The paginator becomes a button that loads more items on click. Use the onLoadMore output inside infiniteConfig to handle the data loading logic.

api.title: API and reference
api.description: Complete documentation of inputs, outputs and interfaces of the Paginator component for advanced integration.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Input properties of the Paginator component

size.description: Size of the paginator buttons. Possible values: 'xs', 'sm', 'md', 'lg', 'xl'. Falls back to global config or md.

variant.description: Visual variant. Possible values: 'solid', 'outline', 'ghost'. Falls back to global config or solid.

color.description: Color palette applied to paginator buttons. Falls back to global config or the library default.

mode.description: Display mode of the paginator: 'default', 'compact', 'fractional' or 'minimal'.

disabled.description: Disables the paginator and all its controls.

currentPage.description: Current page (1-indexed). Model Signal — supports two-way binding with [(currentPage)].

totalItems.description: Total number of items. When provided, totalPages is calculated automatically as Math.ceil(totalItems / itemsPerPage).

totalPages.description: Total number of pages for manual binding when totalItems is not provided. Model Signal — supports two-way binding.

itemsPerPage.description: Items per page. Model Signal — supports two-way binding with [(itemsPerPage)].

maxVisiblePages.description: Maximum number of visible page buttons. Falls back to global config or 5.

pageSizeOptions.description: Options for the page size selector. Falls back to global config or [10, 20, 50, 100].

showFirstLast.description: Show first/last page buttons. Falls back to global config or true.

showPageSizeSelector.description: Show the page size selector. Falls back to global config or false.

showItemRange.description: Show the item range indicator (e.g. '1–10 of 100'). Falls back to global config or true.

showPageJump.description: Show an input to jump to a specific page. Falls back to global config or false.

navDisplay.description: What to show in navigation buttons: 'icon', 'text' or 'both'. Falls back to global config or 'icon'.

navIcons.description: Overrides specific navigation icons (first, previous, next, last, loadMore, loading, prefix).

navTexts.description: Custom texts for the paginator, overriding i18n translations for this instance.

autoScroll.description: Automatically scroll to the top on page change. Falls back to global config or false.

scrollTarget.description: CSS selector or HTML element to scroll to on page change. Defaults to window/body.

keyboard.description: Custom keyboard shortcut configuration for paginator navigation. Falls back to global config.

layout.description: Custom layout to position paginator elements in areas (top, left, center, right, bottom).

mobileLayout.description: Custom layout used automatically on mobile devices. Falls back to global config.

autoMobile.description: Automatically switch to 'fractional' mode on mobile devices.

autoWrap.description: Automatically wrap paginator buttons on small screens to prevent overflow.

infiniteConfig.description: Configuration for infinite loading mode (load-more button or infinite scroll).

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: Events emitted by the Paginator component

pageChange.description: Emitted when the current page changes. Emits the new page number.

pageSizeChange.description: Emitted when the page size changes. Emits the new page size.

pageChangeAdvanced.description: Advanced page change event with full context: new page, previous page, items per page and total pages.

pageSizeChangeAdvanced.description: Advanced page size change event with full context: new size, previous size, current page and total pages.

itemsPerPage.description: Label for the items-per-page selector (e.g. 'Items per page:').

showingItems.description: Template for the item range display. Supports {start}, {end} and {total} placeholders.

page.description: Text for the word 'Page' used in compact/fractional modes.

of.description: Connector word 'of' used in the range text (e.g. '1–10 of 100').

goToPage.description: Label for the page jump input.

go.description: Label for the 'Go' button in the page jump control.

invalidPage.description: Error message shown when the entered page number is invalid.

firstPage.description: Accessible label for the 'First page' button.

lastPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Last page' button.

previousPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Previous page' button.

nextPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Next page' button.

pageLabel.description: Template announced when navigating. Supports {page} placeholder (e.g. 'Page {page}').

morePages.description: Text shown in the ellipsis element representing hidden page buttons.

loadMore.description: Label for the 'Load more' button in infinite mode.

loading.description: Text displayed while loading is in progress.

pageJumpHelp.description: Help text for the page jump input. Supports {totalPages} placeholder.

infiniteLoadedItems.description: Counter text in infinite mode. Supports {loaded} and {total} placeholders.

infiniteLoadEnd.description: Text displayed when there are no more items to load in infinite mode.

a11yPagination.description: ARIA label for the <nav> pagination region.

a11yMorePages.description: ARIA label for the ellipsis element (more pages indicator).

a11yPage.description: Template used in the ARIA live region on navigation. Supports {page} placeholder.

a11yCurrentPage.description: ARIA label for the active page button. Supports {page} placeholder (e.g. '{page}, current page').

a11yGoToPage.description: ARIA label for inactive page buttons. Supports {page} placeholder (e.g. 'Go to page {page}').

a11yCurrentPageWithRange.description: ARIA label when item range is visible. Supports {page}, {totalPages}, {start}, {end} and {total}.

a11yCurrentPageNoRange.description: ARIA label when item range is not visible. Supports {page} and {totalPages} placeholders.

a11yFractionalPage.description: ARIA label for the fractional page display. Supports {page} and {totalPages} placeholders.

a11yShowingItems.description: ARIA announcement for the item range. Supports {start}, {end} and {total} placeholders.

a11yLoading.description: ARIA live announcement made when a new page is loading.

enabled.description: Enable keyboard navigation for the paginator.

firstPage.description: Keys to navigate to the first page. Default: ['Home'].

lastPage.description: Keys to navigate to the last page. Default: ['End'].

previousPage.description: Keys to navigate to the previous page. Default: ['ArrowLeft'].

nextPage.description: Keys to navigate to the next page. Default: ['ArrowRight'].

showLoading.description: Show a loading indicator while the paginator is waiting for data.

loadingDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before the loading indicator is shown.

disableOnLoading.description: Disable all paginator controls while loading is active.

layout.title: PaginatorLayout
layout.description: Interface for custom layout: organizes elements into areas (top, left, center, right, bottom)

top.description: Elements placed in the top area.

left.description: Elements placed in the left area.

center.description: Elements placed in the center area.

right.description: Elements placed in the right area.

bottom.description: Elements placed in the bottom area.

topConfig.description: Alignment configuration for the top area (vertical and horizontal).

bottomConfig.description: Alignment configuration for the bottom area (vertical and horizontal).

leftConfig.description: Alignment configuration for the left area (vertical and horizontal).

centerConfig.description: Alignment configuration for the center area (vertical and horizontal).

rightConfig.description: Alignment configuration for the right area (vertical and horizontal).

verticalAlign.description: General vertical alignment for all areas: 'start', 'center' or 'end'.

first.description: Icon class for the first page button.

previous.description: Icon class for the previous page button.

next.description: Icon class for the next page button.

last.description: Icon class for the last page button.

loadMore.description: Icon class for the load more button in infinite mode.

loading.description: Icon class for the loading spinner.

prefix.description: Icon class prefix (e.g. 'ri-', 'fa-'). Applied to all icon names.

infinite.title: InfiniteConfig
infinite.description: Interface for infinite scroll mode configuration

mode.description: Type of infinite mode: 'scroll' (auto on scroll), 'button' (manual) or 'hybrid'.

scrollOffset.description: Distance in pixels from the bottom of the scroll container that triggers loading.

itemsPerLoad.description: Number of items to load per batch.

maxItems.description: Maximum total number of items to load before stopping.

showCounter.description: Show a counter of loaded vs total items.

initialLoadedItems.description: Number of items already loaded initially, used to synchronize the counter.

onLoadMore.description: Callback invoked when more data needs to be loaded. Can return a Promise.

config.title: PaginatorConfig
config.description: Global configuration object provided via provideNUI({ paginator: { ... } }). Values act as defaults for all paginator instances and can be overridden per instance via component inputs.

color.description: Default color palette applied to all paginator buttons.

maxVisiblePages.description: Maximum number of page buttons visible at once.

showFirstLast.description: Whether to show the first and last page buttons by default.

showPageSizeSelector.description: Whether to display the page size selector by default.

showItemRange.description: Whether to display the item range indicator by default.

showPageJump.description: Whether to display the page jump input by default.

pageSizeOptions.description: Available options for the page size selector.

autoScroll.description: Whether to automatically scroll to the top on page change.

scrollTarget.description: Default CSS selector or element to scroll to on page change.

navDisplay.description: How navigation buttons are displayed globally: 'icon', 'text' or 'both'.

navIcons.description: Global custom icon classes for each navigation button.

navTexts.description: Global custom texts overriding i18n translations for all paginator instances.

keyboard.description: Global keyboard shortcut configuration for paginator controls.

loading.description: Global loading state configuration (spinner, delay, disable on loading).

layout.description: Default desktop layout defining element placement in each area.

mobileLayout.description: Default mobile layout optimized for small screens.

infinite.description: Default infinite scroll or load-more configuration.

styling.title: Styles and customization
styling.description: Customize the appearance of the paginator using CSS variables. Control layout, buttons, page numbers and more.

layout.title: Layout
layout.description: CSS variables for the overall paginator layout and spacing

gap.description: Gap between page buttons inside the paginator.

disabledOpacity.description: Opacity applied to disabled paginator buttons.

pageJumpInputWidth.description: Width of the page jump input field.

zindex.title: Z-index
zindex.description: CSS variables controlling stacking order of paginator elements

active.description: Z-index applied on the active button.

focus.description: Z-index applied when a button is focused.

inactive.title: Inactive buttons
inactive.description: CSS variables for inactive (ghost) page buttons — set by ThemeService based on the active preset

ghostBg.description: Background of inactive page buttons (always ghost/transparent).

ghostText.description: Text color of inactive page buttons.

ghostBorder.description: Border color of inactive page buttons.

ghostHoverBg.description: Background of inactive page buttons on hover.

ghostHoverBorder.description: Border color of inactive page buttons on hover.

active.title: Active page button
active.description: CSS variables for the active page button across all three variants — set by ThemeService based on the active preset

solidActiveBg.description: Background of the active button in Solid variant.

solidActiveText.description: Text color of the active button in Solid variant.

solidActiveBorder.description: Border color of the active button in Solid variant.

outlineActiveBg.description: Background of the active button in Outline variant.

outlineActiveText.description: Text color of the active button in Outline variant.

outlineActiveBorder.description: Border color of the active button in Outline variant.

ghostActiveBg.description: Background of the active button in Ghost variant.

ghostActiveText.description: Text color of the active button in Ghost variant.

ghostActiveBorder.description: Border color of the active button in Ghost variant.

nav.title: Navigation buttons
nav.description: CSS variables for the prev/next/first/last navigation buttons — set by ThemeService based on the active preset

navHoverBg.description: Background of navigation buttons on hover.

navHoverText.description: Text/icon color of navigation buttons on hover.

navHoverBorder.description: Border color of navigation buttons on hover.

misc.title: Miscellaneous
misc.description: CSS variables for the ellipsis, focus ring and page jump controls — set by ThemeService based on the active preset

ellipsisColor.description: Color of the ellipsis (…) element between page buttons.

focusRing.description: Color of the focus ring shown on keyboard-focused buttons.

jumpBorder.description: Border color of the page jump input wrapper.

jumpSeparator.description: Color of the separator between the page jump input and its Go button.

jumpHoverBg.description: Background of the Go button inside the page jump control on hover.

tokens.title: Translation tokens
tokens.description: The Paginator uses i18n tokens for navigation button labels, item range messages and the page size selector.

firstPage.description: Accessible label for the 'First page' button.

previousPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Previous page' button.

nextPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Next page' button.

lastPage.description: Accessible label for the 'Last page' button.

of.description: Connector 'of' used in the range text (e.g. '1–10 of 100').

jumpToPage.description: Placeholder or label for the page jump input.

a11yTokens.title: Accessibility tokens
a11yTokens.description: Additional tokens used for screen reader announcements and paginator aria attributes.

pageLabel.description: Text pattern announced when the page changes (e.g. 'Page 3 of 10').

navigation.description: Aria-label for the paginator navigation region.

roles.title: ARIA roles and attributes
roles.description: The Paginator implements the ARIA navigation pattern with role="navigation" and correctly labelled buttons.

hostLabel.description: The paginator host element has a descriptive aria-label that includes the total number of pages (e.g. 'Paginator, 10 pages').

pageButton.description: Each page button has an aria-label indicating its function (e.g. 'Go to page 3', 'Next page').

currentPage.description: The active page has aria-current="page" to indicate it is the current page.

firstPage.description: The first page button has a specific i18n token for its accessible label (e.g. 'First page').

prevPage.description: The previous page button has a specific i18n token for its accessible label (e.g. 'Previous page').

nextPage.description: The next page button has a specific i18n token for its accessible label (e.g. 'Next page').

lastPage.description: The last page button has a specific i18n token for its accessible label (e.g. 'Last page').

liveRegion.description: The ARIA live region announces the page change with a message that includes the current page number and the total number of pages (e.g. 'Page 3 of 10').

naming.title: Accessible naming
naming.description: All interactive paginator controls get their accessible name from i18n tokens, ensuring they are descriptive in any language.
naming.note: Localize the paginator namespace tokens to ensure meaningful labels.

nav.description: The navigation region uses the navigation token as its aria-label.

pageButtons.description: Each navigation button uses its specific i18n token as its accessible name.

liveAnnouncement.description: The page change announcement uses the pageLabel token with interpolation to announce the current and total pages.

keyboard.title: Keyboard interaction
keyboard.description: The Paginator is fully keyboard-navigable with standard button interaction.

tab.description: Tab moves focus between the paginator buttons and controls.

enterSpace.description: Activates the focused button, navigating to the corresponding page.

setup.title: Global Configuration
setup.description: The Paginator component supports global configuration via provideNUI(). This allows you to define default values once at the application level, avoiding repetition.
setup.note: Global configuration acts as default values and can always be overridden per instance using component inputs.

defaults.title: Configurable properties
defaults.description: The following properties can be configured globally via PaginatorConfig:

rows.color: Default color palette applied to all paginator buttons.
rows.maxVisiblePages: Maximum number of page buttons visible at once.
rows.showFirstLast: Whether to show the first and last page buttons.
rows.showPageSizeSelector: Whether to display the page size selector dropdown.
rows.showItemRange: Whether to display the item range indicator (e.g. 1–10 of 150).
rows.showPageJump: Whether to display the page jump input.
rows.pageSizeOptions: Available options for the page size selector.
rows.autoScroll: Whether to automatically scroll to the top on page change.
rows.navDisplay: How navigation buttons are displayed: icon, text or both.
rows.navIcons: Custom icon classes for each navigation button.
rows.keyboard: Keyboard shortcut configuration for paginator controls.
rows.loading: Loading state configuration (show spinner, delay, disable on loading).
rows.layout: Default desktop layout defining element placement in each area.
rows.mobileLayout: Default mobile layout optimized for small screens.
rows.infiniteLayout: Default layout used when infinite mode is enabled.

priority.title: Resolution priority
priority.description: NUI resolves configuration values using the following priority chain (highest wins):
